case_title: LINDSAY M. BROWN RESPONDENT VS. FIMA GELMAN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT GELMAN, FIMA AS TO RESPONDENT BROWN, LINDSAY M. HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
BRIEF IN SUPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND IN DEFENSE OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS-CLAIM AND ATTACHED EXHIBITS.
DEPT. 525, JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH, CLERK I. HAMMER & PARTIES PRESENT. PARTIES & WITNESS SWORN, TESTIMONY & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. MATTER SUBMITTED.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2003 - CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 (PER PARTIES STIPULATION)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, LINDSAY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
MINUTES FOR JAN-08-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
